attacking_style: Long-range solo attacks on sustained climbs, specifically launching around 9-10km from finish on 18km+ ascents. Capable of finishing strong after extended efforts.
team_tactics: Works as primary domestique for team leaders (LOPEZ) throughout race, conserving form for opportunistic late-race moves when team objectives are secured.
terrain_preference: Long, sustained climbs (18km+) where attrition naturally occurs. Excels when able to maintain tempo over extended distance rather than explosive gradients.
vulnerability: Insufficient data to identify specific weaknesses. Role as domestique may limit opportunities to show full capabilities in high-pressure GC scenarios.
key_patterns: Attacks from 9-10km out on long climbs, suggesting strong time-trial climbing ability
Holds power to drop competitors in final 2km after sustained efforts
Conceals form while working domestique duties, emerging late in stage races
form_trajectory: unknown: Only single race observation available; showed strong form at 2019 Vuelta but no follow-up data
